{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Maker
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Praying to the [[Maker]] is not a common [[Damascan]] practice.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Maker]] is someone [[Simon]] addresses in thought.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Religion and cults]]
